name: PRAGMATA sales top one million in two days - Gematsu
snippet:
Total sales for science-fiction hacking action adventure game PRAGMATA surpassed one million units in two days, Capcom announced.
PRAGMATA sales top one million in two days

name: Pragmata's big launch is giving me hope for single-player games
snippet:

name: Capcom Dominates 2026 With Massive Launches  - Facebook

name: New Capcom IP Pragmata an Instant Success, Sells 1 Million Copies
snippet:
Capcom has confirmed that Pragmata, having released only three days ago, has surpassed one million sales worldwide.
New Capcom IP Pragmata an Instant Success, Sells 1 Million Copies
